pkgmetadata.longdescription: pyymlUse python in yaml pythonpythonfrom pyyml import loadwith open(conf.yml) as f raw_conf f.read()config load(raw_conf)print(config)yaml {...} pythonyamlyamlsum {1 + 1}python{sum 2}yaml libs[os, os.pathpath, this] [][] os.pathpath python from os import pathyamlyaml libs[os, os.pathpath, this]os_name {os.name}base_dir {path.abspath(path.dirname(__file__))}
